features.name: NBA with intra-assignment delay in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment with intra-assignment delay (#N) inside a clocked always block, where the delayed assignment causes the RHS value to be visible only after the current delta cycle

features.name: clock gating with registered enable
features.description: Code should include a clock gating circuit where the enable signal is registered with a delay before being ANDed with the clock signal, causing the gated clock to lag behind the original
features.snippet:
assign gated_clk = (in_clk & en_reg);
always @ (posedge in_clk) en_reg <= #1 en;

features.name: gated clock used in separate always block sensitivity
features.description: Code should include a clock gating design where the gated clock is used as the clock signal in a separate module's always block, creating timing dependency across module boundaries
